_note: Product-line descriptions are inferred commercial copy. ChurroManía product team to review/correct names and details. Image paths point to images/churro-products/<line>/ and images/menu/<cat>/ — drop real photos there with these filenames, or update the paths.

categories.name: Crispy Manía
categories.description: The original. Hand-rolled, fried fresh, dusted in cinnamon sugar.

items.name: Original
items.description: Our signature churro, straight out of the fryer and rolled in cinnamon sugar.

items.name: Chocolate Drizzle
items.description: Crispy churro finished with a ribbon of warm chocolate.

items.name: Dulce de Leche Drizzle
items.description: Cinnamon sugar churro under a sweep of dulce de leche.

items.name: Crispy Trio
items.description: Three classic churros, one order. Made to share, usually not.

categories.name: Twist Manía
categories.description: Filled churros, twisted by hand. The center is the whole point.

items.name: Dulce de Leche Filled
items.description: A long twist packed with dulce de leche from end to end.

items.name: Chocolate Stuffed
items.description: Warm chocolate sealed inside a fresh-fried twist.

items.name: Strawberry Cream
items.description: Strawberry cream filling, cinnamon sugar outside.

items.name: Cookies & Cream
items.description: Cookies and cream filling for the dessert maximalists.

categories.name: Churro Bites
categories.description: Bite-size churros by the cup. Pop, dip, repeat.

items.name: Classic Bites
items.description: A cup of warm cinnamon sugar bites. The road-trip order.

items.name: Choco Bites
items.description: Bites tossed in cocoa, built for dipping.

items.name: Bites Bucket
items.description: The big cup. Two dips included. Share it or don't.

categories.name: Big Manía
categories.description: Oversized churros built to share. A little bit of the world-record energy.

items.name: The Big One
items.description: One giant churro, cinnamon sugar, two dips. Bring friends.

items.name: Family Twist
items.description: A jumbo filled twist made for the table.

items.name: Churro Platter
items.description: A spread of crispy, filled, and bites with a row of dips.

categories.name: Dips & Sauces
categories.description: Pick your dip. Or two. We won't judge.

items.name: Dulce de Leche
items.description: Thick, slow, classic. The house dip.

items.name: Chocolate
items.description: Warm melted chocolate for serious dunking.

items.name: Cream Cheese
items.description: Sweet cream cheese, a quiet favorite.

items.name: Hazelnut
items.description: Hazelnut chocolate spread, warmed for dipping.

categories.name: Shakes & Drinks

items.name: Vanilla Shake
items.description: Classic vanilla, blended thick.

items.name: Chocolate Shake

items.name: Strawberry Shake
items.description: Real strawberry, bright and cold.

items.name: Lemonade
items.description: Fresh-squeezed, just sweet enough.

items.name: Espresso
items.description: A short, strong shot to balance the sugar.
